# The Living Indexes

> A hub for self-updating indexes of the AI-builder ecosystem. Each index is
> recomputed daily from live GitHub signals.

Updated: 2026-06-08T12:35:36.666410+00:00  ·  3913 entries across 10 indexes

- [The Skill Index](https://skill.kymatalabs.com) — 273 entries — Claude Code & AI-agent skills — skills, subagents, slash-commands, hooks.
- [The Eval Index](https://eval.kymatalabs.com) — 267 entries — LLM & agent evaluation, benchmark, observability and red-teaming tools.
- [The Local LLM Index](https://localllm.kymatalabs.com) — 243 entries — Run LLMs on your own hardware — inference engines, runners, quantization.
- [The Prompt Index](https://prompt.kymatalabs.com) — 132 entries — Prompt-engineering resources — collections, system prompts, optimizers, guides.
- [The RAG Index](https://rag.kymatalabs.com) — 214 entries — Retrieval-augmented-generation — RAG frameworks, vector DBs, embeddings, reranking.
- [The Fine-Tuning Index](https://finetune.kymatalabs.com) — 174 entries — Make your own model — fine-tuning frameworks, PEFT/LoRA, RLHF/DPO, training data.
- [StackTracker](https://stacktracker.kymatalabs.com) — 274 entries — The live momentum index for AI-infrastructure repos.
- [Model Radar](https://modelradar.kymatalabs.com) — 150 entries — What's surging on Hugging Face right now — models ranked by momentum.
- [The MCP Index](https://mcp.kymatalabs.com) — 2172 entries — Every Model Context Protocol server, in one living index.
- [Agent Velocity](https://agentvelocity.kymatalabs.com) — 14 entries — The open-source coding-agent race, ranked by velocity.
